{{CargoRelic
|name=Like Moonlight
|class_id=20830
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Natural cycle law #2: Spring is around the corner, but before that, keep yourself warm when the weather is still cold.
|fame=15
|art=13
|fth=14
|civ=17
|tech=30
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +10<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +20<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400<br> (Awakened)
}}
